repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.networking: http client connection and read timeout, retry policy with backoff and idempotency, backpressure, connection pool keep-alive reuse, tls handshake, and partial failure handling
plain prose note with no repository or domain signal

retrieval_query: networking http client connection read timeout retry backoff jitter idempotency backpressure connection pool keep-alive tls handshake partial failure

validation_smoke.name: code.networking L3 validation smoke
signals: every outbound call sets connect, read, and overall timeouts
retries are bounded with exponential backoff plus jitter and only for idempotent requests
client applies backpressure (bounded buffers/concurrency) instead of unbounded queueing
TLS certificate and hostname verification stay enabled

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.networking diagnosis smoke
signals: request hangs because no read/overall timeout is set
retry storm amplifying load with no backoff or jitter
a non-idempotent POST retried, producing duplicate effects
connection pool exhausted or leaking sockets in CLOSE_WAIT
TLS verification disabled or hostname check skipped
